limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not authorize packet assembly, generated packet output, generated biomedical prose, ranking, trial matching, recommendation behavior, patient-specific tooling, or publication workflow.
Schema validation checks route-table output shape only, not expert review, evidence strength, clinical importance, patient relevance, actionability, or publication readiness.
Does not validate real case data, private records, reviewer identities, or patient-specific outputs.
Does not prove source coverage is complete.
